resultRaw.sql: SELECT c.building AS building, SUM(c.capacity) AS total_capacity FROM public.classrooms AS c GROUP BY c.building ORDER BY c.building ASC;

issues: If a specific ordering is required, add an explicit sort in the visualization (SQL ORDER BY likely yields alphabetical order already).
Tooltip title 'Total capacity' is slightly different wording than the y-axis title 'Total seating capacity' (harmless but inconsistent).
